Why Respyr

Two people. Same diet. Different bodies.

For decades, health technology has only tracked the outside of you — steps, calories, heart rate. Your metabolism is more complex than movement alone.

Do everything right, get nothing back.

You follow the diet, sleep eight hours, hit the gym four times a week. The scale won't move and the energy crashes don't stop. Generic formulas don't know what's happening inside you.

Your metabolism changes daily.

Your metabolic state shifts continuously with sleep, stress, hydration, food timing, and recovery. A static calorie model can't capture that. A 60-second breath reading can.

Effort isn't the same as outcome.

Two people can follow the same diet, do the same workout, sleep the same hours — and still experience completely different internal results. The difference is in how the body is responding.

Breath as a new interface.

We built Respyr on one belief: three exhaled biomarkers reflect the real-time chemistry of how your body is fueling, recovering, and digesting — right now.

The science

One breath. Three signals your body's already sending.

Acetone, ethanol, and hydrogen have been studied in labs for decades. Respyr reads all three in 60 seconds — and turns them into six scores you can actually act on.

C₃H₆O · Acetone

Glucose vs. Fat Metabolism

Acetone appears in your breath when your body is burning fat. Tracks how flexibly your metabolism switches between glucose and fat as fuel sources.

Glucose vs. Fat Metabolism

C₂H₅OH · Ethanol

Liver Hepatic Metabolism

Endogenous ethanol reflects how hard your liver is working. Surfaces metabolic strain, detox load, and recovery state — the signal most health tools miss entirely.

Liver Hepatic Metabolism

H₂ · Hydrogen

Gut Fermentation Metabolism

Hydrogen on the breath reflects gut microbial fermentation. Reveals which foods your body digests well and which ones cause excess fermentation activity.

Gut Fermentation Metabolism
Three intelligence layers

11 exhale. Three windows into your metabolism.

Each biomarker maps to a metabolic dimension — fuel, recovery, and digestion — giving you a real-time picture no blood test can match.

01 · Acetone
Glucose vs. Fat Metabolism

Is your body burning glucose or fat right now? This score tracks how flexibly your metabolism switches fuel sources — the signal that tells you if your diet is actually working.

02 · Ethanol
Liver Hepatic Metabolism

How hard your liver is working behind the scenes. This score reflects metabolic strain, detox load, and recovery state — the signal most health tools completely miss.

03 · Hydrogen
Gut Fermentation Metabolism

What's happening in your gut after you eat. This score tracks microbial fermentation activity — revealing which foods your body digests well and which ones it struggles with.

A daily ritual

Sixty seconds of calm.
One blueprint for your day.

Sit. Breathe naturally. Exhale once. The rest is automatic — and the answer comes in the time it takes to brew coffee.

Our product

Lab-grade sensors. Pocket-grade ritual.

Three independent semiconductor sensors — each tuned for one biomarker — inside a brushed aluminum body. Designed to feel calm and premium, not clinical. No needles. No patches. No fasting.

How it works

Decode your metabolism in four steps.

From breath to blueprint in 60 seconds. Designed to feel like a moment of calm — not a clinical procedure.

01

Guided Breath

Power on the device and open the app. The interface guides your inhale, hold, and exhale through calm visual cues.

02

Biomarker Capture

Three sensors capture acetone, ethanol, and hydrogen signals from your single exhale.

03

Intelligence Analysis

Biomarkers become trends and sub-scores. AI explains what your metabolism is actually doing.

04

Adaptive Lifestyle

Today's nutrition, training, and recovery — calibrated to today's actual metabolic state.

FAQ

Have Questions?

Learn how Respyr works, how breath analysis reveals metabolic insights, and how you can use it to improve your health.

  • What is Respyr?

    Respyr is a breath-powered metabolic intelligence platform. It analyzes three exhaled biomarkers — acetone, ethanol, and hydrogen — to reveal six metabolic trends covering how your body is fueling, recovering, and digesting in real time. It's a lifestyle tool, not a medical or diagnostic device.

  • Who is Respyr for?

    Adults who want to understand and optimize their lifestyle. Especially useful for: fitness-focused users, endurance athletes, trainers and coaches, lifestyle-conscious individuals, users on GLP-1 medications, and biohackers who want a new layer of metabolic signal.

  • How is this different from a CGM or Whoop?

    CGMs read glucose. Whoop and Oura read heart variability. All useful, all measuring one dimension. Respyr reads three independent biomarkers in one breath and resolves them into six precise sub-scores. And you don't wear it 24/7 — it's a calm 60-second daily ritual.

  • Do I need to fast before a reading?

    No. Respyr reads your metabolism in its current state. The app auto-detects time of day and adjusts interpretation accordingly. You can take a reading anytime.

  • Will it work for someone on GLP-1 medications?

    Yes. Respyr includes a dedicated GLP-1 adaptive mode. When you indicate you're on semaglutide-class medication, the app adapts your daily guidance — smaller portions, protein-first sequencing, hydration windows, and gentler training recommendations on low-tolerance days.

  • When does it ship?

    Pre-orders ship from Q3 2026, prioritized by reservation order. You're not charged until your unit ships, and you can cancel anytime before shipment.

  • Is my data private?

    Yes. Readings are stored end-to-end encrypted. We never sell your data and don't share it with insurers, employers, or advertisers. You can export or delete everything at any time.

  • What if I'm not satisfied?

    30-day risk-free return. Full refund if Respyr isn't working for you. We cover the return shipping.
